certification_name: Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Account Engagement Consultant
version: Exam questions align to the Summer '23 release

testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Individuals who have experience implementing the Account Engagement application and can explain Salesforce administration concepts that relate to Account Engagement features
recommended_experience: 12 months or more of hands-on experience implementing and administering the Account Engagement Lightning App and Salesforce Platform

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Given a scenario that includes an assessment of a customer's current Salesforce and Account Engagement landscape as well as business objectives, analyze and make recommendations on a path forward.
Design a strategy to identify customer business needs based on marketing trends using currently available tools and methods.
Articulate the implications and importance of technical setup.
Develop a plan to maintain data integrity during data migration.
Given a usage governance plan, develop and recommend a strategy that addresses organization and authorization (or access).
Given a scenario, recommend the best automation tool(s) (automation rule, segmentation rule, dynamic list, completion action).
Given a scenario, design a sequence of events in Account Engagement to complete a marketing initiative (assets, automation, notifications, etc.).
Given a scenario, develop and implement a lead nurturing strategy.
Apply email marketing standards and best practices to customer business needs.
Given a customer scenario, develop and recommend a lead generation strategy including Account Engagement assets.
Given a lead qualification threshold, classify prospects appropriately.
Given a scenario, recommend a model to route qualified and unqualified leads across the business.
Recommend ways to personalize the prospect experience.
Design a strategy to meet a company's consent management requirements.
Recommend the technical setup requirements for reporting and analytics.
Identify reporting methods to solve a given scenario.
Configure Sales Emails and Alerts for sales use.
Summarize the benefits of Sales Emails and Alerts.

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam guides with sample questions on each credential page
